translation_text: A state may be ruled by (measures of) correction;
translation_text_raw: A state may be ruled by (measures of) correction;

translation_text: weapons of war may be used with crafty dexterity;
translation_text_raw: weapons of war may be used with crafty dexterity;

translation_text: (but) the kingdom is made one's own (only) by freedom from action and purpose.
translation_text_raw: (but) the kingdom is made one's own (only) by freedom from action and purpose.

chinese_text: 吾何以知其然哉？以此。天下多忌諱，
translation_text: How do I know that it is so? By these facts: - In the kingdom the multiplication of prohibitive enactments increases the poverty of the people;
translation_text_raw: How do I know that it is so? By these facts: - In the kingdom the multiplication of prohibitive enactments increases the poverty of the people;

chinese_text: 而民彌貧；民多利器，國家滋昬；
translation_text: the more implements to add to their profit that the people have, the greater disorder is there in the state and clan;
translation_text_raw: the more implements to add to their profit that the people have, the greater disorder is there in the state and clan;

translation_text: the more acts of crafty dexterity that men possess, the more do strange contrivances appear;
translation_text_raw: the more acts of crafty dexterity that men possess, the more do strange contrivances appear;

translation_text: the more display there is of legislation, the more thieves and robbers there are.
translation_text_raw: the more display there is of legislation, the more thieves and robbers there are.

chinese_text: 故聖人云﹕「我無為而民自化，
translation_text: Therefore a sage has said, 'I will do nothing (of purpose), and the people will be transformed of themselves;
translation_text_raw: Therefore a sage has said, 'I will do nothing (of purpose), and the people will be transformed of themselves;

translation_text: I will be fond of keeping still, and the people will of themselves become correct.
translation_text_raw: I will be fond of keeping still, and the people will of themselves become correct.

translation_text: I will take no trouble about it, and the people will of themselves become rich;
translation_text_raw: I will take no trouble about it, and the people will of themselves become rich;

translation_text: I will manifest no ambition, and the people will of themselves attain to the primitive simplicity.'
translation_text_raw: I will manifest no ambition, and the people will of themselves attain to the primitive simplicity.'
